summary: Iteration 19 — full backend + frontend acceptance of /peli raffle pivot, content backfill, twitch auto-discovery, dial bug fix, value-prop section, non-clickable streamer cards, EN brand rename to scene-heat. All 18 pytest tests pass. Frontend verified for /peli page, /back-office/peli admin, home zone-whatis, footer legal copy, streamer card non-clickable, dial brand scene-heat.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/peli/entries returns {entries:[], count:int} (dict), not a bare array as stated in the request — both shapes are acceptable; admin BackOfficePeli.jsx must read .entries. Verified consistent with current FE.
POST /api/admin/content/backfill correctly hard-caps requested to 50 inside run_backfill() — confirmed by test (requested=200 → returns 50).
Auto-discovery returned status:'ok' with discovered=0 added=0 — expected behaviour because current FI Twitch top 100 doesn't include casino/slots categories at test time.
/api/data/live-stats returns twitch_live=97 (≥1) — language=fi fix in layer2_workers.py is confirmed live.
All admin endpoints properly enforce X-Admin-Token (return 401 without it).
test_credentials: Admin token: putki-hq-admin (X-Admin-Token header). No user auth on public site.
seed_data_creation: Created ~5 TEST_-prefixed peli_entries (visible in back-office) and 1 test_iter19 prize_label edit on peli_meta. Backfill generated streamer_alert articles (count=3 + count=50). These can stay; safe to ignore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iter19_peli_raffle.py — reusable as regression. All acceptance points for iteration 19 pass. /peli has testid 'peli-page'; back-office /peli uses bo-peli-* testids. Streamer cards are <div> with no href. zone-whatis section uses testids whatis-eyebrow/title/lede/p1/p2/p3. Footer warning copy is 'FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY · NO BETTING ACTIVITY TAKES PLACE'. Dial maker's mark in EN is 'scene-heat · v4'.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures. Twitch dial 0-streams bug RCA was already addressed by main agent: previous code fetched /streams?first=100 without language filter which returned global top streams (none on Finnish roster), now uses language=fi&first=100 returning ~97 FI live streams.
